use_cases: Toggle boolean settings in forms such as enabling dark mode, notifications, or feature flags
Replace traditional checkboxes with a more modern, touch-friendly interface for mobile users
Provide on/off control for individual features in settings panels and preferences interfaces
ai_summary: A reusable toggle switch component built on Base UI's Toggle primitive with CVA variants for sizes (default, lg, sm) and styles (default, outline). Includes built-in accessibility with focus rings, disabled states, and pressed feedback. Designed for mobile and desktop with responsive sizing, making it suitable for settings pages and preference controls across SaaS, e-commerce, and general web applications.
